ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the image */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filaments" (
  "filament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filament */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the filament belongs to */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the filament */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the filament */,
  "long_half_axis" REAL /* Long half axis of the filament */,
  "order_parameter" REAL /* Order parameter of the filament */,
  "of_mass_ratio" REAL /* Mass ratio of the filament */,
  "of_angle_diff" REAL /* Angle difference of the filament */,
  "of_long_half_axis" REAL /* Long half axis of the filament */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the filament */,
  "curvature" REAL /* Curvature of the filament */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the filament */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the filament detection */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the filament data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the filament data was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the filament data */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the filament data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filaments_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filaments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filaments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., object detection, segmentation) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to perform the analysis (in seconds) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the analysis */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filament_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "filament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filament being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., comment, tag) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the annotation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filament_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filament_annotations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filament_annotations_filament_id FOREIGN KEY ("filament_id") REFERENCES filaments ("filament_id")
)
